title: Kubernetes & OpenTelemetry
desc: Full-stack Kubernetes observability with OpenTelemetry. Instrument cloud-native workloads, collect distributed traces, metrics, and logs, and correlate with Dynatrace topology.

title: GenAI & LLM Observability
desc: Observe GenAI and LLM workloads end-to-end. Trace AI pipelines, monitor token usage and latency, and detect anomalies in AI-driven applications with Dynatrace.

title: Business Observability
desc: Leverage Dynatrace BizEvents and dashboards to connect technical performance with real business outcomes. KPI tracking, funnel analysis, and custom business metrics.

title: Advanced DQL 301
desc: Master the Dynatrace Query Language at an advanced level. Build powerful cross-signal queries spanning logs, traces, metrics and business events.

title: Log Ingestion 101
desc: Introduction to log ingestion and analytics. Learn how to ingest, parse, and analyse logs at scale using OpenPipeline and Dynatrace DQL.

title: Browser DEM & Business Observability
desc: Browser Digital Experience Monitoring combined with business observability. Correlate real-user sessions with business KPIs in a single unified view.

title: Live Debugger & Bug Hunting
desc: Diagnose production issues in real-world scenarios using Dynatrace Live Debugger — no redeploys, no restarts. Step through running code with full observability context.

title: Workflow Essentials
desc: Build automated remediation, alerting, and integration workflows using the Dynatrace Workflow engine. From simple notifications to complex multi-step automations.

title: Azure Web App & OpenTelemetry
desc: Deploy and observe Azure Web Apps with OpenTelemetry and Dynatrace. End-to-end instrumentation of cloud-hosted applications on Microsoft Azure.

title: Codespaces Enablement Template
desc: The canonical template to kickstart your own enablement. All Codespaces Framework features pre-configured: docs, monitoring, devcontainer, and CI/CD out of the box.

title: OpenPipeline Segments & IAM
desc: Configure OpenPipeline segments and IAM policies. Learn data routing, retention management, and access control for observability data in Dynatrace.

title: Kubernetes OTel & OpenPipeline
desc: Combine Kubernetes OpenTelemetry collection with OpenPipeline processing. Route, transform, and enrich telemetry data before it reaches Dynatrace.

title: DQL Fundamentals
desc: Get started with the Dynatrace Query Language. Learn the fundamentals of querying logs, metrics, and events with hands-on exercises.

title: Log Analytics Workshop
desc: Workshop-format hands-on lab for log analytics. From ingestion to root-cause analysis — master the full log management lifecycle with Dynatrace.

title: Destination Automation Workshop
desc: Workshop on destination automation with Dynatrace Workflows. Build end-to-end automated pipelines for alerting, ticketing, and remediation.

title: Agentic AI with NVIDIA
desc: Hands-on demo showcasing agentic AI workflows powered by NVIDIA with full Dynatrace observability. Trace AI agents end-to-end, monitor model performance, and detect issues in real-time.

title: MCP Unguard
desc: Security-focused demo using Model Context Protocol with the Unguard intentionally vulnerable application. Explore threat detection, attack surface analysis, and application security with Dynatrace.

title: OpenTelemetry Demo
desc: OpenTelemetry instrumentation demo with Dynatrace. See how traces, metrics, and logs flow from instrumented applications into the Dynatrace platform.

title: Astroshop Runtime Optimization
desc: Optimize Astroshop runtime performance with Dynatrace. Identify bottlenecks, tune resource allocation, and measure improvements in a realistic microservices environment.

title: Astroshop Problem Scenarios
desc: Troubleshoot Astroshop problem scenarios with Dynatrace. Practice root-cause analysis on realistic failure modes across a distributed microservices stack.

title: ACE Integration
desc: ACE integration patterns with Dynatrace. Connect Autonomous Cloud Enablement tools and workflows into the Dynatrace platform.

title: BizObs Journey Simulator
desc: Simulate realistic user journeys for business observability. Generate BizEvents, session replays, and funnel data to practice Dynatrace analytics.

title: Bug Busters
desc: Gamified bug hunting and troubleshooting challenges. Race against the clock to find and fix production issues across a realistic microservices environment.

title: Remote Environment
desc: Provision and manage remote Dynatrace environments for distributed enablement scenarios. Streamline setup, configuration, and teardown of fully instrumented remote workspaces.
